title: oubanguia alata
intro: Oubanguia alata, also known as the Red Ironwood tree, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and West Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oubanguia alata include reducing fever, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, among others. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, tinctures, and extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
